MINI MINUTES FOR APR-30-26 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT MARIA MEJIA'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT. NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: THE UNOPPOSED MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED FOR GOOD CAUSE SHOWN IN THE MOVING PAPERS. DEFENDANT MARIA E. MEJIA SHALL ANSWER OR OTHERWISE RESPOND TO THE COMPLAINT WITHIN 30 DAYS. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

Off Calendar Apr-24-2026 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default
Off Calendar Apr-30-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MARIA MEJIA'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The unopposed motion to set aside default and default judgment is granted for good cause shown in the moving papers. Defendant Maria E. Mejia shall answer or otherwise respond to the complaint within 30 days. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)
